args.query: SELECT o.Id AS OpportunityId, o.OwnerId, o.CreatedDate, c.CompanySignedDate FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2023-05-01' AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id AS OpportunityId, o.OwnerId, o.CreatedDate, c.CompanySignedDate FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON o.ContractID__c = c.Id WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2023-05-01' AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL

args.query: SELECT REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '') AS CleanOwnerId, AVG(JULIANDAY(c.CompanySignedDate) - JULIANDAY(o.CreatedDate)) AS avg_days FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2023-05-01' AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CleanOwnerId ORDER BY avg_days ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '') AS CleanOwnerId, AVG(JULIANDAY(c.CompanySignedDate) - JULIANDAY(o.CreatedDate)) AS avg_days FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2023-05-01' AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CleanOwnerId ORDER BY avg_days ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '') AS CleanOwnerId, AVG(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)) AS avg_days FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2023-05-01' AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CleanOwnerId ORDER BY avg_days ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '') AS CleanOwnerId, AVG(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)) AS avg_days FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2023-05-01' AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CleanOwnerId ORDER BY avg_days ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '') AS CleanOwnerId, COUNT(*) AS opportunity_count, MIN(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)) AS min_days, MAX(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)) AS max_days, AVG(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)) AS avg_days FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2023-05-01' AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CleanOwnerId ORDER BY avg_days ASC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '') AS CleanOwnerId, COUNT(*) AS opportunity_count, MIN(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)) AS min_days, MAX(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)) AS max_days, AVG(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)) AS avg_days FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2023-05-01' AND o.CreatedDate IS NOT NULL AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CleanOwnerId ORDER BY avg_days ASC;
